
{{infobox Chinese|l=Yang Metal Tiger|kanji=еЇЪеѓЕ|romaji=kanoe tora|onyomi=k≈Нin|p=gƒУngy√≠n|w=keng-yin|mi=k…§≈ЛвБµ¬≥ »µin¬≤¬є|y=geng1 jan4|j=geng1 jan4|ci=k…™≈Л j…Рn|mc=k√¶≈Л ≈Лin|oc-bs=kЋ§ra≈Л ≈Лin|qq=}}
{{Sexagenary cycle|qq=}}

'''Yang Metal Tiger also known as еЇЪеѓЕ (kanoetora, koukinnotora, kouin)''' is one of the {{ill|Sexagenary cycle|en|Sexagenary cycle|qid=Q246658|lt=Sexagenary cycle|1=Sexagenary cycle}}.

It is the 27th combination in the Sexagenary cycle; the preceding combination is {{ill|Jich≈Ђ|ja|1=Yin Earth Ox|2=ja|еЈ±дЄС|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jich≈Ђ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Jich≈Ђ|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Earth Ox|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} and the following combination is {{ill|Xinyou|ja|1=Yin Metal Rabbit|2=ja|иЊЫеНѓ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xinyou|13=User:Immanuelle/Yin Metal Rabbit|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. In the system of [[Yin-Yang and Wuxing Theory]], the [[:en:Heavenly Stem|Heavenly Stem]] {{ill|Kinoe (зФ≤)|ja|зФ≤|1=Kinoe (зФ≤)|lt=Kinoe (зФ≤)|2=ja|3=зФ≤|4=zh|5=зФ≤|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|13=User:Immanuelle/Kinoe (зФ≤)|qq=}} represents yang {{ill|Wood (wuxing)|en|Wood (wuxing)|qid=Q2783877|lt=1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (жЬ®)|2=uk|3=–Ф–µ—А–µ–≤–Њ (–µ–ї–µ–Љ–µ–љ—В)|4=id|5=Kayu (Wu Xing)|6=ms|7=Kayu (Wu Xing)|8=bcl|9=Kahoy (wuxing)|10=ca|11=Fusta (wuxing)|12=it|13=Legno (elemento)|14=es|15=Madera (Wu Xing)|16=nl|17=Hout (element)|18=vi|19=MбїЩc (Ng≈© h√†nh)|20=tr|21=Tahta (klasik element)|22=ta|23=аЃЃаЃ∞аЃЃаѓН (аЃЪаѓАаЃ© аЃЃаѓЖаЃѓаѓНаЃѓаЃњаЃѓаЃ≤аѓН)|2=it|3=Legno (elemento)|4=es|5=Madera (Wu Xing)|6=tr|7=Tahta (klasik element)|1=Wood (wuxing)|lt=Wood (жЬ®)|Wood}} and the {{ill|Earthly Branches|en|Earthly Branches|qid=Q1072961|lt=Earthly Branches|1=Earthly Branches}} element {{ill|Tiger|ja|еѓЕ|1=y√≠n|lt=Tiger (еѓЕ)|2=ja|3=еѓЕ|1=Tiger (zodiac)|lt=Tiger (еѓЕ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (zodiac)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger|13=User:Immanuelle/Tiger (Zodiac)|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q16683683}} represents yang {{ill|Fire (wuxing)|en|Fire (wuxing)|qid=Q5451309|lt=ja|Fire (зБЂ)|1=Fire (wuxing)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|2=uk|3=–Т–Њ–≥–Њ–љ—М (–£-—Б—Ц–љ)|4=bcl|5=Kalayo (wuxing)|6=pt|7=Fogo (astrologia)|8=vi|9=HбїПa (Ng≈© h√†nh)|10=ar|11=ЎІўДўЖЎІЎ± (ўИўИ ЎіўКўЖЎЇ)|lt=Fire (зБЂ)|Fire}}, and they interact by Mutual Overcoming (Metal overcomes Wood).
==Pronunciation==
* English: Yang Metal Tiger (еЇЪеѓЕ)
** Chinese (Mandarin Pinyin): gƒУngy√≠n
** Cantonese (Jyutping): gaang1 jan4
**  Japanese:
***Kunyomi 1: Kanoe-tora
***Kunyomi 2: koukin-no-tora
***Onyomi 1: koushin
** Korean (Revised Romanization, Hangul): gyeongin (к≤љмЭЄ)
** Vietnamese (H√°n-ViбїЗt): Canh DбЇІn

==Years of Yang Metal Tiger==
A year in the {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} that leaves a remainder of 30 when divided by 60 is a year of K≈Нgo.
{| class="wikitable"
|+ '''Years of K≈Нgo'''
|-
! {{ill|1st millennium|en|1st millennium|qid=Q25868|lt=1st Millennium|1=1st millennium}} !! {{ill|2nd millennium|en|2nd millennium|qid=Q25860|lt=2nd Millennium|1=2nd millennium}} !! {{ill|3rd millennium|en|3rd millennium|qid=Q26224|lt=3rd Millennium|1=3rd millennium}}
|-
|
* {{ill|AD 34|en|AD 34|qid=Q30238|lt=34 AD|1=AD 34}}
* {{ill|AD 94|en|AD 94|qid=Q33620|lt=94 AD|1=AD 94}}
* {{ill|154|en|154|qid=Q30385|lt=154 AD|1=154}}
* {{ill|214|en|214|qid=Q32938|lt=214 AD|1=214}}
* {{ill|274|en|274|qid=Q33512|lt=274 AD|1=274}}
* {{ill|334|en|334|qid=Q32105|lt=334 AD|1=334}}
* {{ill|394|en|394|qid=Q48126|lt=394 AD|1=394}}
* {{ill|454|en|454|qid=Q30794|lt=454 AD|1=454}}
* {{ill|514|en|514|qid=Q32881|lt=514 AD|1=514}}
* {{ill|574|en|574|qid=Q32597|lt=574 AD|1=574}}
* {{ill|634|en|634|qid=Q31056|lt=634 AD|1=634}}
* {{ill|694|en|694|qid=Q23483|lt=694 AD|1=694}}
* {{ill|754|en|754|qid=Q23646|lt=754 AD|1=754}}
* {{ill|814|en|814|qid=Q23447|lt=814 AD|1=814}}
* {{ill|874|en|874|qid=Q23843|lt=874 AD|1=874}}
* {{ill|934|en|934|qid=Q23803|lt=934 AD|1=934}}
* {{ill|994|en|994|qid=Q24114|lt=994 AD|1=994}}
|
* {{ill|1054|en|1054|qid=Q19369|lt=1054 AD|1=1054}}
* {{ill|1114|en|1114|qid=Q19533|lt=1114 AD|1=1114}}
* {{ill|1174|en|1174|qid=Q19690|lt=1174 AD|1=1174}}
* {{ill|1234|en|1234|qid=Q5424|lt=1234 AD|1=1234}}
* {{ill|1294|en|1294|qid=Q5559|lt=1294 AD|1=1294}}
* {{ill|1354|en|1354|qid=Q6118|lt=1354 AD|1=1354}}
* {{ill|1414|en|1414|qid=Q6179|lt=1414 AD|1=1414}}
* {{ill|1474|en|1474|qid=Q6600|lt=1474 AD|1=1474}}
* {{ill|1534|en|1534|qid=Q6447|lt=1534 AD|1=1534}}
* {{ill|1594|en|1594|qid=Q6777|lt=1594 AD|1=1594}}
* {{ill|1654|en|1654|qid=Q6970|lt=1654 AD|1=1654}}
* {{ill|1714|en|1714|qid=Q6878|lt=1714 AD|1=1714}}
* {{ill|1774|en|1774|qid=Q7697|lt=1774 AD|1=1774}}
* {{ill|1834|en|1834|qid=Q7591|lt=1834 AD|1=1834}}
* {{ill|1894|en|1894|qid=Q7843|lt=1894 AD|1=1894}}
* {{ill|1954|en|1954|qid=Q18581|lt=1954 AD|1=1954}}
|
* {{ill|2014|en|2014|qid=Q1999|lt=2014 AD|1=2014}}
* {{ill|2074 AD|ja|2074еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2074|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2074 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=2070еєідї£|comment=enwiki is a redirect}}
* {{ill|2134 AD|ja|2134еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2134|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2134 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22дЄЦзіА|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2194 AD|ja|2194еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2194|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2194 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=22дЄЦзіА|1=22nd century|qid=Q11177}}
* {{ill|2254 AD|ja|2254еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2254|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2254 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=23дЄЦзіА|1=23rd century|qid=Q49832}}
* {{ill|2314 AD|ja|2314еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2314|comment=changed title based on wikidata|lt=2314 AD|ja_comment=fixed jawiki redirect|3=24дЄЦзіА|1=24th century|qid=Q49838}}
* {{ill|2374 AD|ja|2374еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2374|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2374 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2434 AD|ja|2434еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2434|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2434 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2494 AD|ja|2494еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2494|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2494 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2554 AD|ja|2554еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2554|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2554 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2614 AD|ja|2614еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2614|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2614 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2674 AD|ja|2674еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2674|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2674 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2734 AD|ja|2734еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2734|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2734 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2794 AD|ja|2794еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2794|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2794 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2854 AD|ja|2854еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2854|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2854 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2914 AD|ja|2914еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2914|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2914 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
* {{ill|2974 AD|ja|2974еєі|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/2974|comment=likely broken Sexagenary year|lt=2974 AD|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}
|}

=== Events ===
* In the 4th Year of {{ill|Empress Jit≈Н|en|Empress Jit≈Н|qid=Q232026|lt=Empress Jit≈Н|1=Empress Jit≈Н}} (690 AD) вАУ the "K≈Нgo Nenseki" (еЇЪеѓЕеєіз±Н) was completed and implemented.

==Months of Yang Metal Tiger==
In a {{ill|Common Era|en|Common Era|qid=Q208141|lt=Common Era|1=Common Era}} year whose final digit is 1 or 6 (that is, when the {{ill|Heavenly Stems|en|Heavenly Stems|qid=Q1190985|lt=Heavenly Stems|1=Heavenly Stems}} are {{ill|Xin|ja|иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|lt=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|2=ja|3=иЊЫ|4=zh|5=иЊЫ|1=Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xin|13=User:Immanuelle/Kanoto (иЊЫ)|qq=}} or {{ill|Bing|ja|дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|lt=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|2=ja|3=дЄЩ|4=zh|5=дЄЩ|1=Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bing|13=User:Immanuelle/Hinoe (дЄЩ)|qq=}}), the month of {{ill|January|en|January|qid=Q108|lt=January|1=January}} becomes the [[Month (Calendar)|month]] of K≈Нgo. However, here the term вАЬmonthвАЭ may refer either to the month of the [[Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|Lunisolar]] or to a seasonal month (from {{ill|Lichun|en|Lichun|qid=Q1364685|lt=Risshun|1=Lichun}} until the day before {{ill|Jingzhe|en|Jingzhe|qid=Q1306596|lt=Keichitsu|1=Jingzhe}}) as applicable.

==Days of Yang Metal Tiger==
The [[Day Selection|selection]] for a K≈Нgo day is as follows.
=== Day Selection ===
A K≈Нgo day is the 7th day of {{ill|Topp≈Нkure|ja|еНБжЦєжЪЃ|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Topp≈Нkure|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Topp≈Нkure|1=Ten directions|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q11405067}}.
== See Also ==
* {{prefix|qq=}}
* {{intitle|qq=}}

{{citation needed|ja|1=Yang Wood Horse|2=ja|зФ≤еНИ|version=98658269|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{translated page|ja|qq=Yang Metal Tiger|qq=ja|еЇЪеѓЕ|version=103609405|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{wikidata link|Q1063199|af|Metaaltier (astrologie)|cdo|GƒХng-√ђng|de|Metall-Tiger|fr|Tigre de m√©tal|hak|K√Ґng-y√ђm|ja|еЇЪеѓЕ|ko|к≤љмЭЄ|nds|Metall-Tiger|vi|Canh DбЇІn|za|Gengyinz|zh-min-nan|Keng-√Ѓn|zh-yue|еЇЪеѓЕ|zh|еЇЪеѓЕ|zh-min-nan|Keng-ch√°|cdo|K√°ng-cбє≥ћДde|nds|Metall-Tigeri|de|Yang Metal Tiger|ja|зФ≤еНИ|de|Metall-Tigreen|en|Metal Tiger|fr|Tigre de m√©talboishak|it|Kang-chбє≥ћБid|za|Gengceij|ar|Yang Metal Tiger}}
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle]]
[[Category:Sexagenary cycle members]]
[[Category:Git synced pages]]
[[Category:translated pages with valid en interwikis]]
[[Category:Wikidata has short description]]
[[Category:WikiProject Japanese Calendar]]
[[Category:Pages with interwikis with duplicate languages]]
